case_title: MORAN, WUILMAN IND. & DBA COSMOS ELECTRIC CO. VS ALHAFNAWI, HAITHAM HUSSIEN IND& DBA AL'S BODY SHOP et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $200.00 FILED BY MORAN, WUILMAN IND. & DBA COSMOS ELECTRIC CO. AS TO DEFENDANT ALHAFNAWI, HAITHAM HUSSIEN IND& DBA AL'S BODY SHOP ELHEFNAWI, FERAS IND & DBA AL'S BODY SHOP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPY OF ORDER MAILED TO PLTF. PLTF SHALL PAY THE $22 FILING FEE WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THIS DATE OF THE PLTF'S CLAIIM WILL BE NO EFFECT.
TIMELY REPLY TO PAYMENT OF COURT FEES, FILED BY PLTF.
ORDER TO AMEND PARTY NAME BEFORE HEARING, AND ADDING ANOTHER DEFT, SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALHAFNAWI, HAITHAM HUSSIEN IND& DBA AL'S BODY SHOP ELHEFNAWI, FERAS IND & DBA AL'S BODY SHOP PLAINTIFF FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-19-2005, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-29-2005 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES IS GRANTED IN PART BY COMM. PLTF SHALL PAY ALL FEES LISTED IN CA RULES OF COURT EXCEPT SHERIFF FEES.
REQUEST TO AMEND PARTY NAME BEFORE HEARING AND ADDING ANOTHER DEFT, FILED.
